prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为80328→64370→57928→55258→54119，整体呈持续前移趋势，近4年累计前移约26209名；2025年基准位次约54119名，为近年最高水平；该校在江苏省物理类招生计划持续扩增：2021年30人、2022年44人、2023年47人、2024年57人、2025年63人；2026年计划66人，较2025年增加3人，小幅扩招约4.8%，对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名中校本部（中国石油大学（北京））2026年位列第62名，近年排名稳定在48–62区间，属于中上游211层次；克拉玛依校区共享校本部211/双一流身份；该校在声誉评价、抖音热度及投档异常文件中均无显著记录，整体舆情平稳，未见明显负面或断档信号；作为异地校区（新疆克拉玛依），在东部省份考生中存在一定地域偏好阻力；校本部石油与天然气工程为A+学科（全国顶尖），化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等为优势学科；克拉玛依校区招生专业以石油工程、油气储运工程、化学工程与工艺等为核心，与校本部优势学科高度匹配，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、自动化、电气工程等专业社会热度持续偏热，石油工程类相关专业热度平稳；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数521000人，按近年物理类占比约71.5%估算，物理类考生约37.3万人，较2025年26.1万人增长约43%，竞争压力显著加大；该校位于新疆克拉玛依市，与江苏省地理距离远，气候、生活习惯差异大，对东部考生存在一定地域偏好阻力；该校在江苏省招生占比逐年提升，2025年物理类计划63人，反映该校对江苏生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年小幅扩招（+3人）、江苏省物理类考生大幅增加（约+43%）以及地域偏远因素。考生规模激增是推动位次前移的最关键因素，扩招和地域阻力部分抵消；预计2026年最低位次约55165名，区间54665–55665名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间54665–55665名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向（化学工程与工艺、新能源科学与工程、数学与应用数学等），一档专业（石油工程、计算机类、自动化）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（会计学、金融学、经济学）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<54665名）可重点冲击一档王牌石油工程类专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 80328 → 64370 → 57928 → 55258 → 54119, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 26,209 places over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 54,119, the highest in recent years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangsu Province has been expanding: 30 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 47 in 2023, 57 in 2024, and 63 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 66, an increase of 3 from 2025, a small expansion of about 4.8%, slightly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, the main campus (China University of Petroleum (Beijing)) ranked 62nd in 2026, with stable rankings between 48–62 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the Karamay Campus shares the 211/Double First-Class status of the main campus; the university has no significant records in reputation evaluations, Douyin popularity, or abnormal filing documents, with overall stable public opinion and no obvious negative or gap signals; as a remote campus (Karamay, Xinjiang), there is some regional preference resistance among candidates in eastern provinces; the main campus's Petroleum and Natural Gas Engineering is an A+ discipline (top in the country), with Chemical Engineering and Technology, Geological Resources and Geological Engineering as advantageous disciplines; the Karamay Campus offers majors such as Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering, and Chemical Engineering and Technology, highly aligned with the main campus's advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Automation, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular socially, while Petroleum Engineering-related majors have stable popularity; in 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangsu Province General College Entrance Examination is 521,000, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 373,000 based on the recent proportion of about 71.5%, an increase of about 43% from 261,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, far from Jiangsu Province with large differences in climate and living habits, posing some regional preference resistance for eastern candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu Province has been increasing year by year, with 63 Physics Category slots in 2025, reflecting the university's emphasis on Jiangsu students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the small expansion in 2026 (+3 slots), the significant increase in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province (about +43%), and the remote location factor. The surge in candidate numbers is the most critical factor driving the ranking upward, partially offset by expansion and regional resistance; the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 55,165, with a range of 54,665–55,665.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 54,665–55,665, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction (Chemical Engineering and Technology, New Energy Science and Engineering, Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc.), with Tier 1 majors (Petroleum Engineering, Computer Science, Automation) as reach choices, and Tier 3 majors (Accounting, Finance, Economics) as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<54,665), you can focus on aiming for the top-tier Petroleum Engineering majors in Tier 1.
